ab: Lri iluka ku numiane mulregelrege kaykameane.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: Makalra ku tulaulaungu lregelrege amia ku ina.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子。
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: Lri iluka ku numiane muangaangade kaykameane.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: Lri balre ta ki dae?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: Lri muinu ta kaykameane?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: Lri iluku mitaane muababiabila ki drakerale.
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: Lri muinu ta kaykameane?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: Lri iluku mitaane mulregelrege ka sinisi.
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: Lri muata babiabila ki drakerale kaykameane?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: Ini, lri iluku mitaane mulregelrege ka sinisi.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: Lri mulregelrege ta kaykameane?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: Ini, lri muangaangade ta kaykameane.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: Sinisi, lri muata babiabila ki drakerale dreele ku manemane?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: Ilata dreele ki tharukaaisi.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: Lri mulregelrege ta dreele ku manemane?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: Lri dreele ta ki takulralrava.
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: Lri muangaangade ta tumane?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: Lri muangangade ta dreele ki paivaivay ku lapanay, la dradreela ki ababuungu si tumu!
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: Sinisi, lri mubabiabila ta ki drakerale languy?
ch: A:老師我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: Ini, lri dreele ta ki tharukaabisi.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: Lri iluku mitaane muangaangade paivay ku lacenge ka sinisi.
ch: A:老師我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: Lri balre ta ku dae kaykameane.
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: Kavay ngiapapapalay ka tharukaabisi.
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: Taw dreela ku panianianiake ku tharukaabisi.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: Kavay ngiapapapalay ka takulralrava.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: Wa! madalama ku ki takulralrava, mathariri turamuru.
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: Kavay ngiapapapalay ka takulralrava.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: Kavay kaika takulralava, kavay tumu.
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: Ikayyanga kwini dredreele, madha katuatuase muadaidaili!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: Unu, kai nay lrikatuase mua ki taadailane?
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: Madha tinulrabuabuale.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: Naw saradreele amia ku.
en: I want to see them right away.
